name: accountants at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month tool
description: For accountants at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes compliance risks and potential penalties. We automate report generation instead of manual reconciliation processes using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accountants at law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
problem_solved: Inaccurate or delayed trust account reconciliation reports
features: manual entry for initial data input
